title: Fig. 4 in Meerkats (Suricata suricatta), a new definitive host of the canid nematode Angiostrongylus vasorum
author: Gillis-Germitsch, Nina
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 4. Agarose gel (1.5%) stained with GelRed™ showing PCR products of part of the internal transcribed spacer (ITS) 2-region of Angiostrongylus vasorum of 37 gastropod samples: samples no. 8, 23, 29 and 35 were positive. M: DNA ladder, N: negative control, P: positive control.
steps_raw: Fig. 4. Agarose gel (1.5%) stained with GelRed™ showing PCR products of part of the internal transcribed spacer (ITS) 2-region of Angiostrongylus vasorum of 37 gastropod samples: samples no. 8, 23, 29 and 35 were positive. M: DNA ladder, N: negative control, P: positive control.
